text.title: gitlab-cicd Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for gitlab-cicd as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding credentials or API keys in `.gitlab-ci.yml`.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: `.gitlab-ci.yml` is committed to Git. Even if the repository is private, any team member or compromised account can read the file and extract credentials.
